MerchantPayoutDetail.Include subscriptions within the specifi: Include subscriptions within the specified date range
MerchantPayoutDetail.Do not include subscription in payout: Do not include subscription in payout
MerchantPayoutDetail.TRANSFER FUNDS FROM TREASURY A/C: TRANSFER & PAYOUT TO BANK FUNDS FROM TREASURY A/C
MerchantPayoutDetail.finance account to merchant connected ac: The amount will be transferred from Fonda finance account to merchant connected account
MerchantPayoutDetail.merchant’s treasury account to default r: The amount will be transferred from merchant’s treasury account to default recipient bank account
MerchantPayoutDetail.RevenueProcessingFeeApplied: ( Reason: As the total lifetime revenue ( $ {{lifetime_total_revenue}} ) exceeds the Revenue processing threshold ( $ {{RevenueProcessingThreshold}} ) , the Revenue processing fee is applied. )
MerchantPayoutDetail.RevenueProcessingFeeNotApplied: ( Reason: The Revenue Processing Fee is not applied because the total lifetime revenue ( $ {{lifetime_total_revenue}} )  is below the Revenue Processing Threshold ( $ {{RevenueProcessingThreshold}} ) . )

FinanceSetting.Processing fee fixed amount in USD: Processing fee fixed amount in USD
FinanceSetting.Automatic Revenue Processing Fee Calcula: Automatic Revenue Processing Fee Calculation Settings
FinanceSetting.Enable or Disable auto-subscription waiv: Enable or Disable auto-subscription waived off
FinanceSetting.Automatic Revenue Processing Fee Thresho: Enter the lifetime revenue threshold at which the system will automatically apply a revenue processing fee to payouts. Once the total revenue of the account reaches this threshold, the fee will be deducted from subsequent payouts.
FinanceSetting.Revenue Processing Fee Percentage text: Enter the percentage of the revenue fee to be applied to the current payout once the revenue processing fee threshold is reached.
FinanceSetting.Downtime Percentage text: If the downtime percentage is below the specified threshold, the subscription fee will be waived off
FinanceSetting.market place price flag descp: if flag set: it will take the prices from parseur or uber EATS orders, if flag not set, it will take the price from the menu standard price.

MerchantSettingTab.Auto Accept ubereats orders: Auto Accept ubereats and stream orders
MerchantSettingTab.Storefront - Charge Card Fees to Custome: Storefront - Charge Card Fees to Customer
MerchantSettingTab.MerchantStatusDescriptionNotActive: This indicates that this merchant is not an active business with Fonda.
MerchantSettingTab.MerchantStatusDescriptionActive: This indicates that this merchant is in active business with Fonda.
MerchantSettingTab.Send Text Notification to Android: Display notification text on android tablet

streamMsgs.uploadFondaMenumsg1: Have you reviewed your menu details, including name, hours, items, and prices?
streamMsgs.uploadFondaMenumsg2: Menu updates take 10-15 minutes to fully sync, including item statuses.
streamMsgs.uploadFondaMenumsg3: To avoid disruptions, it’s best to sync your menu during off-hours when your restaurant is less busy.
streamMsgs.Before proceeding, please ensure the fol: Before proceeding, please ensure the following:
streamMsgs.ConnectStreamcheckboxes1: Merchant details (name, hours, address, tax %, platform, users) are correct.
streamMsgs.ConnectStreamcheckboxes2: At least one platform flag should be enabled.
streamMsgs.ConnectStreamcheckboxes3: Fonda POS must be connected in the Stream Portal to go live.
streamMsgs.Additional steps are required in the Str: Additional steps are required in the Stream Portal to fully disconnect from Grubhub.
Additional steps are required in the Stream Portal to fully disconnect from DoorDash.
streamMsgs.To switch back to Email Protocol, you mu: To switch back to Email Protocol, you must contact Grubhub Support.
To switch back to Email Protocol, you must contact DoorDash Support.
streamMsgs.Disabling this will stop order flow from: Disabling this will stop order flow from Stream to Fonda for Grubhub.
Disabling this will stop order flow from Stream to Fonda for DoorDash.
streamMsgs.Additional steps are required in the Str: Additional steps are required in the Stream Portal to complete the Grubhub integration.
Additional steps are required in the Stream Portal to complete the DoorDash integration.
streamMsgs.After Stream integration, Email Protocol: After Stream integration, Email Protocol will stop working.
streamMsgs.Menu details (name, hours, prices, inclu: Menu details (name, hours, prices, including platform-based prices) are correct.
streamMsgs.DisConnectStreamcheckboxes1: Orders and menus will no longer sync via Stream for DoorDash and GrubHub.
streamMsgs.DisConnectStreamcheckboxes2: Plan ahead for an alternate approach to ensure business continuity.

dashboard.Tooltip for DoorDash: Estimated earnings after deductions for DoorDash.

dashboard.Tooltip for Storefront: Estimated earnings after deductions for Storefront.
dashboard.All figures are estimated and subject to: All figures are estimated and subject to deductions or applicable marketing fees from DoorDash, UberEats, or Grubhub.

AccountDetailTooltips.businessAddressDescription: Restaurant address where it is physically situated or operates.
AccountDetailTooltips.timezoneDescription: Standard time offset for location, affects Orders scheduling and coordination.
AccountDetailTooltips.emailDescription: Email address of the restaurants owner or manager. It is saved for reference only
AccountDetailTooltips.dobDescription: Date of Birth of the restaurants owner
AccountDetailTooltips.phoneDescription: Restaurants Owner or Managers Mobile number where the Fonda dashboards alerts / notification will be sent
AccountDetailTooltips.onboardingCompletedDescription: Indicates successful completion of onboarding process of the restaurant.
AccountDetailTooltips.legalBusinessNameDescription: The official registered name of the restaurant legal entity.
AccountDetailTooltips.einNumberDescription: Restaurants business identification number for the tax purposes.
AccountDetailTooltips.businessNumberDescription: Registration number for the restaurants business entity.
AccountDetailTooltips.bankAccountNumberDescription: Restaurants Bank Account number for the purposes of Payouts/Stripe connect account
AccountDetailTooltips.bankAccountRoutingNumberDescription: Restaurants Branch  number for the purposes of Payouts/Stripe connect account

PayoutScreenTooltips.numberOfOrdersDescription: Total number of completed orders within the period considered for the payout calculation
PayoutScreenTooltips.subTotalDescription: The calculated sum of the costs of individual items or services in an order before the application of taxes, discounts, or additional charges. It represents the initial cost of the selected items.
PayoutScreenTooltips.taxDescription: Total sum of business tax applied on the orders for the payout period
PayoutScreenTooltips.commissionDescription: Is a fee or percentage of a transaction amount that fonda earns as compensation for facilitating or completing service.
PayoutScreenTooltips.commissionAdjustmentsDescription: It refers to changes or modifications made to the standard commission rate, often used to account for special circumstances, incentives, or corrections in sales or service agreements.
PayoutScreenTooltips.squareFeeDescription: Fee charged by the Square payment processing service for handling transactions. It includes a percentage of the transaction amount along with a fixed fee, covering the cost of payment processing.
PayoutScreenTooltips.processingFeeDescription: Charge associated with handling and facilitating transactions, consisting of a percentage of the transaction amount . We can add this fee in merchant settings
PayoutScreenTooltips.errorChargesDescription: It refers to additional fees or penalties imposed due to errors, mistakes, or violations in a transaction or business process, serving as a corrective measure.
PayoutScreenTooltips.staffTipsDescription: Total Staff Tips paid by customers through Fonda Direct orders
PayoutScreenTooltips.orderAdjustmentsDescription: Typically refer to changes, modifications, or corrections made to an existing customer order, whether it's adjusting items, quantities, or prices to ensure accuracy and customer satisfaction.
PayoutScreenTooltips.marketPlaceFacilitatorTaxUbereatsDescrip: Is the tax collected and remitted by Uber Eats on behalf of restaurants to cover sales tax obligations. The specific tax rate and details can vary by location and tax regulations.
PayoutScreenTooltips.promoDiscountDescription: It is a reduction in the price of a product or service applied as a result of a promotional offer, coupon code, or marketing campaign, allowing customers to pay less for their order
PayoutScreenTooltips.subscriptionAdjustmentsDescription: Any adjustments you want to make against the subscription amount
PayoutScreenTooltips.revenueProcessingFeeDescription: Fonda's Revenue sharing % applied to the total order value as agreed as per T&Cs.
PayoutScreenTooltips.marketingFeeDescription: Charge imposed by a platforms towards restaurant marketing in the marketplaces like Doordash
PayoutScreenTooltips.payoutAdjustmentsDescription: Any positive or negative adjustments you want to make to the final payout amount
PayoutScreenTooltips.netPayoutDescription: The final amount that a restaurant will receives after all deductions, fees, and adjustments have been taken into account from the total revenue. It represents the actual funds to be send.
PayoutScreenTooltips.totalRevenue: Total revenue generated by all channels
PayoutScreenTooltips.fondaPayout: The Final Amount after adding Net Payout and Subscription.
PayoutScreenTooltips.fondaRevenue: The amount remian after subtracting Sub payout from the Total revenue generated by all channels.
PayoutScreenTooltips.fondaRevenuePercentage: Generated by dividing Differnce with total GMV as (Differnce/ Total GMV)*100

FinanceComponentsTooltips.businessTaxDescription: Business Tax % of the Restaurant indicates the percentage of a company's income subject to taxation, influencing overall financial planning and compliance
FinanceComponentsTooltips.staffTipDescription: Staff Tip % is the percentage of the bill that customers leave as a gratuity for the service staff, typically ranging from 15% to 20%.
FinanceComponentsTooltips.ubereatsCommissionDescription: UberEats Commission % charged to the restaurants revenue. This is deducted from the Restaurants Total Revenue
FinanceComponentsTooltips.doordashCommissionDescription: Doordash Commission % charged to the restaurant's revenue. This is deducted from the Restaurants Total Revenue
FinanceComponentsTooltips.grubhubCommissionDescription: Grubhub Commission % charged to the restaurant's revenue. This is deducted from the Restaurants Total Revenue
FinanceComponentsTooltips.flipdishCommissionDescription: Flipdish Commission % charged to the restaurant's revenue. This is deducted from the Restaurants Total Revenue
FinanceComponentsTooltips.processingfeeDescription: Card Processing Fee % charged during the Fonda direct order
FinanceComponentsTooltips.processingFeeFixedAmountDescription: Card Processing fixed amount charged during the Fonda direct order
FinanceComponentsTooltips.marketPlaceDescription: Marketplace Facilitator Tax (Uber Eats %) is the percentage of sales that Uber Eats collects and remits on behalf of restaurants to cover sales tax obligations. The specific percentage can vary by location.
FinanceComponentsTooltips.squareProcessingFeeDescription: Square Processing Fee % is the percentage of a transaction amount that Square charges for its payment processing services, typically around 2.6% to 2.9%.
FinanceComponentsTooltips.automaticRevenueProcessingFeeThresholdDe: Enter the minimum revenue amount that triggers automatic processing fees. This threshold helps manage fee calculations and ensures accurate revenue tracking.
FinanceComponentsTooltips.revenueProcessingFeePercentageDescriptio: Specify the percentage rate for processing fees applied to revenue transactions.
FinanceComponentsTooltips.minimumRevenueForSubscriptionDescription: Minimum Revenue for Subscription Calculation is the lowest amount a business must earn in order for Fonda to charge the subscription fees
FinanceComponentsTooltips.downtimePercentageDescription: Define the allowable percentage of system downtime before triggering alerts or maintenance actions.

MerchantSettingTooltips.acceptSpecialInstructionsDescription: Accept Special Instructions in Order refers to a feature that allows customers to provide specific, customized requests or preferences for their orders, enhancing their experience
MerchantSettingTooltips.autoAcceptUbereatsOrdersDescription: Auto Accept UberEats And Stream Orders (Yes/No) is a preference setting that determines whether incoming UberEats orders are automatically accepted by the restaurant (Yes) or if manual confirmation is required (No).
MerchantSettingTooltips.connectedDeviceIdDescription: Connected Device ID is a unique identifier associated with a connected Android tablet ID thru Esper.
MerchantSettingTooltips.pauseResumeParserDescription: Pause/Resume Parser is a control or function that enables the temporary interruption (pause) and subsequent continuation (resume) of Order parsing or processing. It is related to Parseur Service
MerchantSettingTooltips.pauseResumeFondaParserDescription: Pause/Resume Parser is a control or function that enables the temporary interruption (pause) and subsequent continuation (resume) of Order parsing or processing. It is related to Fonda Parser Service. This service is not used currently
MerchantSettingTooltips.busyModeDescription: Busy Mode is a status setting that indicates restaurant busy status, so the additional time is added to the order ready countdown.
MerchantSettingTooltips.orderPreparationTimeDescription: Order Preparation Time (in minutes) is the estimated amount of time required by restaurant to prepare the order
MerchantSettingTooltips.orderDelayTimeDescription: Order Delay Time (in minutes) is the additional time beyond the estimated preparation time that a customer may need to wait for their order to be ready due to busy mode
MerchantSettingTooltips.allowGoogleReviewsReplyDescription: Allow Google Reviews Reply is a setting that permits or restricts the ability of restaurant to reply to the feedback thru Fonda Dashboard
MerchantSettingTooltips.storefrontChargeCardFeesDescription: Storefront - Charge Card Fees to Customer refers to a policy or setting that allows a business to pass on the fees associated with credit card transactions to the customer, indicating whether or not customers will incur these additional charges.
MerchantSettingTooltips.merchantEmailDistributionListDescription: Merchant Email Distribution List is a list of email addresses for merchants or business owners used for distributing information, updates, or communications relevant to their operations or services.
MerchantSettingTooltips.notificationText: To save the settings, you must enter a message in the notification text field and ensure the notification text on android tablet is turned on.
MerchantSettingTooltips.bogoEnabledDescription: BOGO is used to apply discount amounts in an order.
MerchantSettingTooltips.platformPriceEnabledDescription: Platform Price is used to set different prices for different platforms.
MerchantSettingTooltips.pollingEnabledDescription: Polling functionality is used to display missing notifications for an order.
MerchantSettingTooltips.pollingFrequencyDescription: Defines how many minutes to wait between each API call.

StoreFrontTooltips.uRLSlugDescription: It is used to update url of Fonda storefront
StoreFrontTooltips.uploadLogoDescription: We can upload the logo of our restaurant maximum size allowed 1.7 MB
StoreFrontTooltips.uploadBannerDescription: We can upload the banner of our restaurant Image Size Max allowed 1.5 MB and Video 21 MB
